name: DynaVap - Titanium Tip: Vong
summary: The DynaVap Vong utilizes a titanium tip equipped with a Nona notched contoured extraction chamber and built-in grinder.
description: The DynaVap Vong utilizes a titanium tip equipped with a Nona notched contoured extraction chamber and built-in grinder. Its trisected 5 fin design enables efficient heat transfer and the Adjust-a-Bowl feature allows customisable dosing chamber size. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
